parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter by status not equal to value (pending, scheduled, done, rescheduled, postponed, deleted)
parameters.name: status_not

parameters.description: Filter by start_date from (RFC3339 format, inclusive)
parameters.name: start_date_from

parameters.description: Filter by start_date to (RFC3339 format, inclusive)
parameters.name: start_date_to

parameters.description: Filter by cron_expression IS NULL (true) or IS NOT NULL (false)
parameters.name: cron_expression_is_null

parameters.description: Exclude tasks where cron_expression IS NOT NULL AND requires_confirmation == True (implements: NOT (cron_expression IS NOT NULL AND requires_confirmation == True))
parameters.name: exclude_cron_with_confirmation

get.description: Retrieves a task by its ID

put.description: Updates a task by its ID

delete.description: Marks a task as deleted by its ID (soft delete)

post.description: Marks a task as done, updates it in the database, and queues worker.delete_task in a transactional manner. If queueing fails, the database update is rolled back. Returns task DTO without status (assumed "done") to avoid extra repo fetch.

500.description: Internal server error or transaction failure
